title: How to Respond to MHRA Findings
alt: Five-step process for responding to MHRA inspection findings

items.label: Understand the findings
items.desc: Read what was written; note critical, major or other grading

items.label: Map to the requirement
items.desc: Anchor each finding to GMP, GDP, Annex 1 or ALCOA+

items.label: Build a compliant CAPA
items.desc: Separate correction, root cause and corrective action

items.label: Evidence and timelines
items.desc: Back every claim with proof; commit to dates you can keep

items.label: Govern and escalate
items.desc: Quality and senior leaders own; QP, RP or RPi sighted
